title: User Journey Map
shortDescription: Map the end-to-end user experience across touchpoints to identify friction, emotions, and opportunity moments.
jobsToBeDone: Visualize the full user experience across stages
Identify friction points and drop-off moments
Uncover opportunity areas for product improvement
Align cross-functional teams on user pain points

inputs.label: User Persona
inputs.example: Mid-level marketing manager at a B2B SaaS company, 3-5 years experience, manages a team of 2-3, uses multiple tools for campaign management

inputs.label: Core User Goal
inputs.example: Launch and track a multi-channel marketing campaign from planning through performance analysis

inputs.label: Product or Service
inputs.example: CampaignHub — a marketing automation platform with email, social, and analytics modules

inputs.label: Journey Scope
inputs.example: End-to-end from first hearing about the product through becoming a power user (awareness → activation → retention)

inputs.label: Known Pain Points (optional)
inputs.example: Users struggle with initial template setup, report customization is confusing, onboarding emails have low open rates
